assertions.title: Runtime readiness and starting company inventory are captured before QA begins

steps.action: Review bootstrap evidence and raw captures for health, inventory, and process-budget posture.
steps.expected: Bootstrap artifacts document runtime readiness, starting inventory, and single-instance/process-budget notes.
steps.observed: bootstrap.md records one mission-controlled app instance, node_process_count=33, the starting BAD/WEA inventory, and links to raw health/company captures.

steps.expected: Current inventory is readable and can be compared with bootstrap evidence.
steps.observed: Inventory returned PAP active plus BAD and WEA paused; this matches the earlier before/after bootstrap evidence chain.

notes: Current curl /api/health remained healthy while testing.
Current curl /api/companies returned PAP active, BAD paused, and WEA paused.

assertions.title: The live company-creation path reaches a usable company-scoped state

steps.action: Review bootstrap evidence for the live company-creation path used during bootstrap.
steps.expected: Evidence identifies the real path taken and the resulting QA company identifiers or blocker.
steps.observed: bootstrap.md shows the in-app Add company path from the dashboard shell, creation of company 379b3817-9e7c-4483-bff0-ab2e908de27c (PAP), and the later usable-state captures.

steps.action: Open the live app root in a browser session.
steps.expected: A usable company-scoped surface is reachable for the QA company.
steps.observed: Root redirected to /PAP/dashboard and rendered the QA company dashboard without console errors.

steps.expected: A usable scoped work surface is visible.
steps.observed: Issues page showed PAP-1 "Capture bootstrap QA evidence" and the existing CEO agent context.

steps.action: Run curl against the QA company agents and issues endpoints.
steps.expected: A corroborated post-bootstrap state exists for the QA company.
steps.observed: API returned agent d508e34e-0b40-4b01-850d-b2f1d1bd6a9b (CEO, idle) and issue 88757a82-2838-467f-86ea-ba5ac13242e6 (PAP-1, todo) under company 379b3817-9e7c-4483-bff0-ab2e908de27c.

notes: Live browser check currently lands on /PAP/dashboard.
Live API check still shows the QA company, CEO agent, and PAP-1 issue as reachable company-scoped state.

issues.description: The original bootstrap onboarding did not finish with the expected seeded agent/task state; bootstrap.md records that the company and goal were created but onboarding looped back instead of completing, so usable state had to be established afterward for the same QA company.

assertions.title: Company-context routing anomalies are reproduced or ruled out

steps.action: Set browser localStorage key paperclip.selectedCompanyId to a nonexistent UUID and navigate to /dashboard.
steps.expected: The suspected stale-company anomaly is either reproduced or ruled out with a clear routing outcome.
steps.observed: The app reproduced the anomaly by navigating to /dashboard/dashboard and rendering a Company not found page for prefix "DASHBOARD".

steps.action: Inspect body text and browser network activity for the misroute.
steps.expected: Evidence shows the malformed route and the company-context request behavior.
steps.observed: Body text reported 'No company matches prefix "DASHBOARD"' and network logs included GET /api/companies/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000404/dashboard before normal QA-company dashboard fetches.

steps.action: Navigate to root / with the same stale localStorage value.
steps.expected: Control path confirms whether root recovers correctly.
steps.observed: Root recovered to /PAP/dashboard, ruling out a broader root-navigation failure while confirming the unprefixed /dashboard bug.

notes: Live recheck still reproduced /dashboard -> /dashboard/dashboard with Company not found.
Live root recheck still recovered to /PAP/dashboard.

issues.description: With stale paperclip.selectedCompanyId state, visiting unprefixed /dashboard still misroutes to /dashboard/dashboard and renders a Company not found page instead of recovering to a valid company dashboard.

assertions.title: Onboarding validation gates are audited before real creation

steps.action: Open the live Add company onboarding flow from /PAP/dashboard.
steps.expected: The current runtime exposes a real onboarding path that can be inspected without creating data.
steps.observed: Add company opened an in-app onboarding modal with Agent, Company, Task, and Launch steps.

steps.action: Advance to the Company step without entering required values.
steps.expected: The flow surfaces a visible validation gate and does not silently advance.
steps.observed: On the Company step, both textboxes resolved empty and the Next button stayed disabled, preventing progression beyond the invalid state.

steps.action: Inspect browser network activity and re-run GET /api/companies after the invalid path.
steps.expected: No unintended company, agent, or issue creation occurs from the failed path.
steps.observed: Browser logs showed only GET requests during the invalid attempt and the companies inventory remained the same three-company set (PAP, BAD, WEA).

steps.action: Compare the current invalid-state behavior with the existing bootstrap evidence.
steps.expected: Previously captured invalid-gate evidence remains sufficient and materially consistent.
steps.observed: Existing evidence shows the company-step blocked state before successful creation; current behavior remains visibly blocked as well, with the live flow now preventing progress while required company/goal inputs are empty.

notes: Live recheck found the Company-step Next button disabled with empty company and goal inputs.
Re-reading GET /api/companies after the invalid flow showed no additional entities.

summary: Tested 4 bootstrap assertions. All four pass as audit assertions. Current runtime remains healthy; the QA company PAP is usable with CEO and PAP-1 present; the stale-company unprefixed /dashboard misroute still reproduces; and the live add-company onboarding flow still blocks invalid progression without creating entities.
